q.en: An organization mandates a baseline Definition of Done. The Scrum Team has agreed internally to apply stricter criteria. A new Developer joins and starts shipping work that meets the org DoD but not the team's stricter criteria. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Organizacija je določila bazno Definicijo Končanega. Scrum tim je interno sogodil za doslej bolj stroge kriterije. Nov razvijalec se pridruži in začne pošiljati delo, ki izpolnjuje organizacijsko Definicijo Končanega, ne pa tudi strožjih kriterijev tima. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Coach the new Developer that the team's stricter DoD applies and is non-negotiable
options.sl: Coachati novega razvijalca, da je strožja Definicija Končanega tima zavezujoča in ni predmet pogajanj

options.en: Facilitate the team revisiting their stricter DoD with the new Developer as a full participant in the conversation
options.sl: Olajšati timski pregled strože Definicije Končanega z novim razvijalcem kot polnopravnim udeležencem v pogovoru

options.en: Allow the new Developer to follow only the org DoD; the stricter criteria are aspirational
options.sl: Dovoliti novemu razvijalcu, da sledi le organizacijski Definiciji Končanega; strožji kriteriji so zaželeni, vendar ne zavezujoči

options.en: Ask the Product Owner to enforce the team's DoD on the new Developer
options.sl: Prositi lastnika produkta, da uveljavi timsko Definicijo Končanega pri novem razvijalcu

why.en: The team's DoD belongs to the Developers as a whole, including its newest member. Treating it as a fixed rule the new Developer must accept undermines self-management; allowing it to be ignored undermines transparency. The Scrum Master facilitates a fresh conversation so the team can confirm or evolve the stricter criteria with all current members. The PO does not enforce DoD.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega tima pripada razvijalcem kot skupini, vključno z njegovim najnovejšim članom. Obravnava kot fiksno pravilo, ki jo mora novi razvijalec sprejeti, podkopava samoupravljanje; toleriranje njene kršitve podkopava preglednost. Scrum Master olajšča svež pogovor, tako da tim lahko s vsemi trenutnimi člani potrdi ali razvije strože kriterije.

q.en: Two weeks into a one-month Sprint, the Developers find that the chosen technical approach is unworkable. The Sprint Goal is still feasible, but it now requires fundamentally different work than what is in the Sprint Backlog. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Dve tedna v mesečni Sprint je razvijalcem jasno, da izbrani tehnični pristop ni izvedljiv. Cilj Sprinta je še vedno dosegljiv, vendar zahteva temeljito drugačno delo kot to v seznamu dela Sprinta. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Recommend the Product Owner cancel the Sprint and start a fresh one
options.sl: Priporočiti lastniku produkta, da prekliče Sprint in začne novega

options.en: Coach the Developers to renegotiate the Sprint Backlog with the PO while preserving the Sprint Goal
options.sl: Coachati razvijalce, da pogajajo seznam dela Sprinta z lastnikom produkta in pri tem ohranijo cilj Sprinta

options.en: Direct the Developers to pivot to the new technical approach immediately
options.sl: Naročiti razvijalcem, da se takoj obrnejo na novi tehnični pristop

options.en: Note the issue and inspect it at the Sprint Retrospective
options.sl: Zabeležiti problemo in jo pregledati na Retrospektivi Sprinta

why.en: The Sprint Backlog is expected to adapt during the Sprint as more is learned. The Sprint Goal is the commitment, not the plan. Cancelling is for when the Sprint Goal becomes obsolete, which is not the case here. Directing violates self-management. Waiting for the Retrospective delays adaptation that the Sprint itself supports.
why.sl: Seznam dela Sprinta se pričakuje, da se prilagaja med Sprintom, ko se spozna več. Cilj Sprinta je zaveza, ne načrt. Preklic je namenjen, ko cilj Sprinta postane zastarel, kar tu ni primer. Naročanje krši samoupravljanje. Čakanje do retrospektive odlaga prilagoditev, ki jo sam Sprint omogoča.

q.en: A senior stakeholder asks to attend the Daily Scrum to "stay informed about Sprint progress." The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Visoki deležnik se želi udeležiti Dnevnega Scruma, da bi ostal "informiran o napredku Sprinta". Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Allow attendance because transparency to stakeholders is a core Scrum value
options.sl: Dovoliti udeležbo, ker je preglednost do deležnikov temeljna vrednost Scruma

options.en: Decline; the Daily Scrum is a closed event for the Developers under Scrum rules
options.sl: Zavrniti; Dnevni Scrum je zaprta prireditev za razvijalce po Scrum pravilih

options.en: Coach the stakeholder on the Sprint Review as the right transparency forum, then decline
options.sl: Coachati deležnika o Pregledu Sprinta kot pravem forumu za preglednost, nato zavrniti

options.en: Allow with the constraint that the stakeholder cannot speak or interrupt the team
options.sl: Dovoliti z omejitvijo, da deležnik ne more govoriti ali prekinjati tim

why.en: The Daily Scrum is for the Developers; its purpose is inspection and adaptation toward the Sprint Goal. Stakeholder presence chills team conversation and steers it toward reporting. Transparency to stakeholders is provided through the Sprint Review and visible artifacts (Sprint Backlog, Increment). The Scrum Master coaches on this rather than refusing on procedural grounds.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je namenjen razvijalcem; njegova namena sta pregled in prilagoditev proti cilju Sprinta. Prisotnost deležnika otlumi timski pogovor in ga usmerja k poročanju. Preglednost do deležnikov je zagotovljena prek Pregleda Sprinta in vidnih artefaktov (seznam dela Sprinta, Inkrement). Scrum Master coacha to namesto da bi zavrnil na procesnih osnovah.

q.en: A Developer has missed Sprint Goals four Sprints in a row. Their teammates have tried to help; tension is rising; the Retrospective has not surfaced the issue. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Razvijalec je zgrešil Cilje Sprinta štiri Sprinte zapored. Njegovi soteamates so se trudili pomagati; napetost raste; Retrospektiva ni odkrila problema. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Wait for the team to raise it themselves — self-management requires patience
options.sl: Čakati, da tim problem sam spravi na povrhnjico — samoupravljanje zahteva potrpljenja

options.en: Address it privately with the underperforming Developer
options.sl: Nasloviti to zasebno z razvijalcem s slabšimi rezultati

options.en: Facilitate the next Retrospective so the team can inspect this team dynamic, even if uncomfortable
options.sl: Olajšati naslednjo Retrospektivo, da tim presledi to timsko dinamiko, čeprav je nelagodno

options.en: Take the issue to the Developer's line manager
options.sl: Vzeti problem v obravnavo vodje razvoja

why.en: The Scrum Master is accountable for the Scrum Team's effectiveness and for the productivity of Scrum events. Passive waiting does not honor that accountability when the Retrospective is repeatedly avoiding a clear issue. Private performance conversations and escalating to a manager bypass the Scrum Team's collective inspection — the team must own its dynamic, with facilitation.
why.sl: Scrum Master je odgovoren za učinkovitost Scrum tima in produktivnost Scrum prireditev. Pasivno čakanje ne spoštuje te odgovornosti, kadar Retrospektiva večkrat izogiba jasnem problemu. Zasebni razgovori o učinkovitosti in eskalacija do vodje zaobidejo skupinski pregled tima — tim mora biti lastnik svoje dinamike, z olajšanjem.

q.en: Leadership announces a new performance review process based on individual story-point output. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Vodstvo napoveduje nov proces vrednovanja, temelječ na posameznem izhodu točk. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Communicate the new process to the team so they can adjust their workflows accordingly
options.sl: Komunicirati nov proces timu, da se lahko prilagodi njihovim delovnim procesom

options.en: Refuse to participate; this performance system fundamentally violates Scrum principles
options.sl: Zavrniti; ta sistem vrednovanja temeljito krši Scrum načela

options.en: Coach leadership on how individual-output metrics undermine self-management; propose outcome-based alternatives
options.sl: Coachati vodstvo o tem, kako metrike posameznega izhoda podkopavajo samoupravljanje; predlagati izide-usmerjene alternative

options.en: Quietly comply with the rollout to maintain organizational support for Scrum overall
options.sl: Tiho sodelati v uvedbi, da ohrani organizacijsko podporo Scrumu

why.en: The Scrum Master serves the organization by leading and coaching on Scrum and empirical thinking. Individual output metrics distort behavior and erode self-management. Coaching with a constructive alternative (outcome measures) is more effective than communicating, refusing, or quietly complying — each of which abandons the SM's coaching accountability in different ways.
why.sl: Scrum Master služi organizaciji z vodenjem in coachingom Scruma in empiričnega razmišljanja. Metrike posameznega izhoda izkrivljajo vedenje in erodirajo samoupravljanje. Coaching z konstruktivno alternativo (merjenjem izidov) je bolj učinkovit kot komuniciranje, zavračanje ali tiho sogodovanje — vsak od teh zapusti odgovornost coachinga Scrum Mastera na drugačen način.

q.en: It is the scheduled Sprint Review and zero stakeholders attend. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Je zaplanirana Pregled Sprinta in se ne pojavi noben deležnik. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Cancel the Sprint Review and reschedule for a time when stakeholders can attend
options.sl: Preklicati Pregled Sprinta in ga preložiti na čas, ko se deležniki lahko udeležijo

options.en: Hold the Review with the Scrum Team and surface the absent stakeholders as an impediment to address
options.sl: Izvesti Pregled s Scrum timom in izpostaviti odsotne deležnike kot oviro, ki jo je treba nasloviti

options.en: Skip the Sprint Review this Sprint and resume in the next one to save the team's time
options.sl: Preskočiti Pregled Sprinta ta Sprint in nadaljevati v naslednjem, da prihrani timski čas

options.en: Have the Scrum Master speak on behalf of stakeholders so the collaboration still happens
options.sl: Imeti Scrum Mastera govoriti v imenu deležnikov, da se sodelovanje še vedno zgodi

why.en: Scrum events are time-boxed and should not be skipped or rescheduled. Holding the Review preserves the team's inspection rhythm. The lack of stakeholders is itself a transparency and engagement problem the SM must surface — the team adapts the Product Backlog with the information it has, while the SM coaches the organization on the Sprint Review's purpose.
why.sl: Scrum prireditve so časovno omejene in jih ne smemo preskakati ali odklapljati. Izvajanje Pregleda ohranja timski ritualnost pregleda. Odsotnost deležnikov je sama po sebi problem preglednosti in angažiranosti, ki ga mora Scrum Master izpostaviti — tim prilagodi seznam produkta s podatki, ki jih ima, medtem ko SM coacha organizacijo o nameni Pregleda Sprinta.

q.en: The Scrum Team has committed to a Sprint Goal that turns out to require security expertise the team lacks. A skilled external contractor is available immediately. Which actions are consistent with Scrum? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Scrum tim se je zavezal cilju Sprinta, ki se izkaže za potreban strokovnjak za varnost, ki ga tim nima. Sposoben zunanji izvajalec je takoj razpoložljiv. Katera dejanja so skladna s Scrum? (Izberite vse, ki veljajo)

options.en: Renegotiate the Sprint Backlog scope and surface the skills gap as an impediment
options.sl: Pogajati se seznam dela Sprinta in izpostaviti vrzel spretnosti kot oviro

options.en: Bring the contractor inside the Scrum Team for the Sprint as a Developer
options.sl: Pripeljati izvajalca v Scrum tim kot razvijalca za Sprin

options.en: Have the contractor work on the security task outside the Scrum Team for this Sprint
options.sl: Imeti izvajalca delati na varnostni nalogi zunaj Scrum tima za ta Sprint

options.en: Ignore the gap; ship without security work and address it in a future Sprint plan
options.sl: Ignoriraj vrzel; odpošlji brez varnostnega dela in to naslov v načrtu prihodnjega Sprinta

options.en: Begin cross-training Developers in the missing skill, even if the Sprint Goal is partially missed
options.sl: Začeti usposabljanje razvijalcev v manjkajočej spretnosti, čeprav bo cilj Sprinta le delno dosežen

why.en: Cross-functional means the team has the skills it needs each Sprint — but Scrum allows adapting the team and the Sprint to reality. Renegotiating scope and surfacing the gap (option 0), temporarily incorporating the contractor as a Developer (option 1), and using the Sprint to start building the skill internally (option 4) all preserve team accountability for the Increment. Treating the contractor as outside the team (option 2) creates a permanent dependency anti-pattern. Shipping without the security work (option 3) violates the Definition of Done.
why.sl: Raznolikost pomeni, da ima tim spretnosti, ki jih potrebuje vsak Sprint — vendar Scrum dovoljuje prilagoditev tima in Sprinta realnosti. Pogajanje obsega in izpostavitev vrzeli (opcija 0), začasno vključevanje izvajalca kot razvijalca (opcija 1) in uporaba Sprinta za začetek oblikovanja spretnosti interno (opcija 4) vsi ohranjajo odgovornost tima za Inkrement. Obravnavanje izvajalca zunaj tima (opcija 2) ustvari trajno odvisnost antipattern. Pošiljanje brez varnostnega dela (opcija 3) krši Definicijo Končanega.

q.en: Two Scrum Teams contributing to the same product have evolved different and incompatible Definitions of Done. A senior leader proposes that the Scrum Master "harmonize" the DoDs. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Dva Scrum tima, ki prispevata k istemu produktu, sta razvila različni in nezdružljivi Definiciji Končanega. Visoki vodja predlaga, da Scrum Master "uskladi" Definicije Končanega. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Negotiate a common DoD with the other Scrum Master and impose it on both teams
options.sl: Pogajati skupno Definicijo Končanega z drugim Scrum Masterjem in jo naložiti obema timoma

options.en: Defer to the org-wide baseline DoD if one exists; otherwise let the two DoDs stand
options.sl: Zatrditi se s širšo organizacijsko bazno Definicijo Končanega, če obstaja; v nasprotnem primeru pustiti dve Definiciji Končanega stati

options.en: Facilitate a working session with both teams' Developers to inspect the differences and converge on a unified DoD
options.sl: Olajšati delavnico z razvijalci obeh timov, da pregledajo razlike in se dogovorijo o enotni Definiciji Končanega

options.en: Have the Product Owner select which team's DoD wins
options.sl: Imeti lastnika produkta izbrati, katere timske Definicije Končanega zmaga

why.en: For multiple teams on the same product, Increments must integrate, which requires a consistent DoD. The Definition of Done is created by the Developers — not by Scrum Masters, not by the Product Owner, and not by leadership. Imposing a DoD bypasses self-management. Allowing incompatible DoDs to stand breaks Increment transparency at the product level. Facilitating Developer-to-Developer convergence honors both principles.
why.sl: Pri več timih na istem produktu se Inkrementov morajo integrirati, kar zahteva doslednost Definicije Končanega. Definicija Končanega je ustvarjena s strani razvijalcev — ne s strani Scrum Masterjev, ne s strani lastnika produkta in ne s strani vodstva. Nalaganje Definicije Končanega zaobide samoupravljanje. Toleriranje nezdružljivih Definicij Končanega razbije preglednost Inkrementov na ravni produkta. Olajšanje konvergence razvijalca do razvijalca spoštuje obe načeli.

q.en: Unable to reach the Product Owner during the Sprint, the Developers have been making product decisions in their absence — clarifying scope, making trade-offs, and reordering work mid-Sprint. The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Razvijalci ne morejo dosegati lastnika produkta med Sprintom in zato sprejemajo odločitve o produktu v njegovi odsotnosti — pojasnjujejo obseg, sprejemajo kompromise in preurednjujejo delo med Sprintom. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Coach the Developers to stop making PO decisions and pause until the PO is reachable
options.sl: Coachati razvijalce, da prenehajo sprejemati odločitve lastnika produkta in počakajo, da je lastnik dostopen

options.en: Take over Product Owner activities and decisions until the PO returns to the team
options.sl: Prevzeti dejavnosti in odločitve lastnika produkta, dokler se lastnik ne vrne v tim

options.en: Coach the PO on availability and facilitate a sustainable refinement rhythm with the team
options.sl: Coachati lastnika produkta na dostopnosti in olajšati trajnostni ritualnost izpopolnjevanja s timom

options.en: Accept the situation; Developers can refine and order when the PO is unavailable
options.sl: Sprejeti situacijo; razvijalci lahko izpopolnjujejo in urejajo, kadar je lastnik produkta nedostopen

why.en: Developers can collaborate on refinement, but ordering and value decisions are PO accountabilities and cannot be delegated implicitly. Coaching the team to stop and wait creates blocked work. Taking over PO activities is not a Scrum role for the SM. Accepting Developers as substitute POs erodes the accountability structure. The principled fix is coaching the PO on availability — addressing the root cause.
why.sl: Razvijalci lahko sodelujejo pri izpopolnjevanju, vendar so ureditve in odločitve o vrednosti odgovornosti lastnika produkta in se ne morejo implicitno delegirati. Coaching tima k stanju in čakanju ustvari zaustavljeno delo. Prevzemanje dejavnosti lastnika produkta ni vloga Scrum Mastera. Sprejemanje razvijalcev kot nadomestnih lastnikov produkta erode strukturo odgovornosti. Principialna rešitev je coaching lastnika produkta o dostopnosti — naslov glavnega vzroka.

q.en: After three Sprints of self-management, a Scrum Team is paralyzed: nothing gets decided, no one owns problems, Sprint Goals miss. They ask the Scrum Master to 'just tell us what to do.' The Scrum Master should:
q.sl: Po treh Sprintih samoupravljanja je Scrum tim paraliziran: nič se ne odloči, nihče ne prevzame problemov, Cilji Sprinta se zgrešijo. Sprašujejo Scrum Mastera, da jim 'samo reče, kaj naj naredijo'. Scrum Master bi moral:

options.en: Direct decisions for now — self-management can be reintroduced once delivery has stabilized
options.sl: Naročiti odločitve za zdaj — samoupravljanje se lahko ponovno predstavi, ko se dostava stabilizira

options.en: Refuse — self-management is non-negotiable and the team must figure it out themselves
options.sl: Zavrniti — samoupravljanje je nenegljivo in tim si mora sam ustvariti

options.en: Coach the team through specific decisions one at a time, building self-management capability gradually
options.sl: Coachati tim skozi posebne odločitve po ena naenkrat, postopoma gradeč sposobnost samoupravljanja

options.en: Recommend the Scrum Team be disbanded and reformed with different membership
options.sl: Priporočiti, da se Scrum tim razpusti in ponovno oblikuje z drugačnim članstvom

why.en: Self-management is foundational to Scrum, but it isn't binary — teams build it. Directing undermines the long-term goal and signals that compliance is acceptable. Refusing leaves the team without scaffolding. Disbanding is extreme. Coaching specific decisions — what does the team need to figure out next, and how — builds the muscle while keeping work moving.
why.sl: Samoupravljanje je temelj Scruma, vendar ni binarno — timi ga oblikujejo. Naročanje podkopava dolgoročni cilj in signalizira, da je skladnost sprejemljiva. Zavračanje pusti tim brez opore. Razpustitev je skrajna. Coaching specifičnih odločitev — kaj mora tim ugotoviti naslednje in kako — gradi mišico hkrati z gibanjem dela.
